title: マイルCSの後に・トラストミー！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle scores a magnificent victory,
eliciting celebratory cheers and thunderous
applause from the stands!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By defeating the mighty Silence Suzuka and
scoring victories in three G1 sprints, Taiki has
undoubtedly demonstrated her star potential.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After dominating all of her races, she only has
one goal remaining—becoming the next
Umamusume of the Year!
